title: window functions issues
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_y (id INT PRIMARY KEY, part VARCHAR(10), qty DOUBLE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
SELECT id, part, qty, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY part, qty) AS rank_id, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY part, qty) AS row_id FROM test_y WHERE qty IS NOT NULL ORDER BY part, qty;
SELECT part, qty, DENSE_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY part, qty) AS rank_id FROM (SELECT part, qty FROM test_y WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL) AS subquery ORDER BY part, qty;
SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY part ORDER BY qty) AS row_id, part, qty FROM test_y WHERE qty IS NOT NULL OR created_at IS NULL;
key_bug_features: using window functions with mixed column selections
